allow: Bash(git stash push -m "wip: denied_hosts + openai-compat tool normalization + config env fix")
Bash(git add config.toml config.toml.example src/config/config.ts src/config/schema.ts src/integration/e2e.test.ts src/model/openai-compat.ts src/runtime/executor.test.ts src/runtime/executor.ts)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: switch sandbox networking to denylist, fix openai-compat tool messages

Flip Deno sandbox from allowed_hosts allowlist to denied_hosts denylist
for more permissive default networking. Fix OpenAI-compatible provider to
properly normalize tool_use/tool_result blocks instead of serializing as
text. Fix config env override to check provider type before selecting
API key variable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
